text:
Name (, Namae) is the 27 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on December 25 th , 2009 in Japan and by Viz Media on March 1 st , 2011 in English.

Chapters

281. Godspeed (, Kanmuru)
282. Sealed Area (, Misshitsu)
283. Determination (, Kesshin)
284. Fifteen Minutes (15, Jū Go Fun)
285. Doubles (, Bunshin)
286. Core (, Hontai)
287. Present State (, Genjō)
288. Accolade (, Shōsan)
289. Terms (, Jōken)
290. Name (, Namae)

Summary

After Knuckle finishes attacking Menthuthuyoupi and makes his getaway, Killua uses his Godspeed to overwhelm the Royal Guard, but runs out of electricity and escapes with Meleoron's God's Accomplice. In the throne room, Morel further questions if he should keep waiting or attack Shaiapouf's cocoon. In the palace's basement, Ikalgo struggles to kill Bloster, eventually knocking him unconscious with sleeping gas but unable to pull the trigger.

Morel finally destroys Pouf's cocoon and deactivates Smoky Jail, and Pouf splits into hundreds of clones, thanking the Hunter for setting him free. Unable to defeat the clones, Morel and his "Smoke Troopers" ignore the Royal Guard, but Pouf suddenly steals his pipe and flies away. Knuckle and Youpi suddenly appear before him, and the two Hunters use their smoke clone strategy to fight Youpi.

As Hina and Shidore rescue Bizeff from the fallen rubble, Morel and Knuckle trick Youpi twice, allowing Knuckle to land a punch on the Royal Guard just before he explodes. Pouf throws Morel's pipe in a nearby river and uses his clones to survey the palace, suddenly seeing the explosion as he returns. With Shoot saved by Knov, Killua recharges and tells Meleoron to assess the situation with Morel and Knuckle, adding that he will go back to Gon. As Neferpitou continues to heal Komugi and Gon sits in silence, Pouf appears and attempts to find out the King's location.

Youpi harnesses his rage and transforms into a centaur-like creature, destroying Morel's smoke clones as the interest from A.P.R. continues to increase. Arriving at their destination, the King attempts to dissuade Netero from fighting, but the Chairman understands the mission's importance and uses his 100-Type Guanyin Bodhisattva to strike the King. After learning the King's location, Pouf plays along with Gon's orders and secretly sends most of himself to assist the King. Morel reaches his limit, but is saved by Meleoron when Youpi tries to kill him. Knuckle reveals himself and deactivates A.P.R. in exchange for Youpi letting Morel and Meleoron live.

After a bald Knov arrives and takes Morel to safety, Knuckle and Meleoron team up to take on the other Royal Guards. Youpi and Pouf find one another and make their way toward the King, who still refuses to fight back. Netero offers to reveal the King's name to him if he can make Netero admit defeat, and the King agrees.
